title.en: So, after he had gained enough success, he retu...

content.en:
This emperor-level thought that his strength was extremely strong, but in the face of Ye Tian, he couldn't bear a move at all, and was killed in seconds with one move, which was also the reason why he couldn't believe it.

However, his consciousness dissipated, and everything had nothing to do with him.

After killing this emperor, Ye Tian took a look at his Aluo mother's main imprint and found that he had obtained 30 points, which showed that the strength of this emperor-level was indeed very good.

Under normal circumstances, the average top emperor-level, after killing, can only get seven or eight points of record, but the other party is worth 30 points of record, proving that the strength is very strong.

But no matter how powerful the emperor is, he is still far inferior to him, and he was easily killed by him.

As time passed, Ye Tian encountered one flame demon spirit after another, and then killed these flame demon spirits, obtained the flame demon bead, and also killed some other emperor-level lords.

"Eight, Seven, Seven" However, if there are more other emperors killed, it will also attract the attention of other main departments, which will cause some changes in this area, in case it attracts extremely terrifying emperor list powerhouses, such as the top ten powerhouses of other tribes, Ye Tian may not be able to beat it.

So, after he had gained enough success, he returned to the fortress of Arromu.

......

Aromu Fortress.

Ye Tian submitted the task, and all those flame beads became battle points.

Originally, when he came to the Aromu Fortress, his record point was 0, but now his record point has reached more than 2800.

Of course, more than 2,800 points is not much, and he still needs to accumulate more records.

Moreover, many treasures in the Aromu Fortress need to be exchanged for a lot of battle points, with his current strength, ordinary treasures are useless to him, and he must exchange them for that extremely precious treasure.

Therefore, he can't use up his current record, he has to save it.

So in the following years, Ye Tian occasionally went to take on some single tasks, as well as kill some emperor-level of other main departments, but he didn't kill too many emperor-level every time, just because he was worried about attracting too much attention.

In this way, he has more and more record points.

"The 50,000 battle mark is pointed, and you can exchange it for that treasure!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, he arrived at the Battle Record Exchange Office at the Arrowmu Fortress, where he exchanged for a treasure.

"Give me the Peak Ancient Demon Grade Rock Dragon Scale!"

Ye Tian said.

The emperor-level staff member in charge of the exchange business immediately said: "To exchange the Rock Dragon Scale of the Peak Ancient Demon, you need 50,000 battle points!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

And this emperor-level staff member showed a look of surprise, after all, it was 50,000 battle points, and it was really too difficult for an emperor to come up with 50,000 battle points, how many tasks do you have to complete or how many emperors can you kill?

But soon, Ye Tian successfully deducted 50,000 battle points, proving that he did have this balance.

Soon.

A huge rock dragon scale was sent and handed over to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian immediately returned to his residence with this rock dragon scale, and then began to comprehend this rock dragon scale.

The reason why he exchanged this rock dragon scale was because this rock dragon scale was very special, containing the life pattern of the peak ancient demon-level rock dragon.

It can be said that the value of this rock dragon scale is even more precious than the Ultimate Gujian Fragment, but if the comprehension is poor, they can't understand anything from the Rock Dragon Scale, for the Ancient Demon level existence, it is still the Ultimate Gujian Fragment that is more precious, and the Ultimate Gujian helps them to comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm.

However, the scales of the rock dragon only contained life patterns, not the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and those ancient demon-level beings were even more eager for the Ultimate Gu Jian fragment.

Now.

Ye Tian needed to comprehend the scales of the rock dragon and understand the peak ancient demon-level life pattern, so as to improve his own life pattern and his ultimate way of ten thousand laws.

Rumble!!!!!

His ultimate will seemed to have entered the scales of the rock dragon, and an unimaginably terrifying rock dragon ancient demon appeared in front of him, and the dense scales and life pattern aura appeared.

Compared to this Rock Dragon Ancient Demon, his current life pattern is still very ordinary, far inferior to the other party.

After all, his current life pattern is at most equivalent to an ordinary top-level ancient demon level existence, and since he has not reached the ancient demon level, the life pattern has not really transformed, and the gap is even greater.

In this way, in the years that followed, he continued to comprehend the scales of the rock dragon, while the other replica bodies tried to perfect their own life patterns and perfect their own ultimate path of ten thousand laws.

Time flies, and hundreds of ancient demon eras have passed in the blink of an eye.

At this time, his strength has improved a little, but it has not yet reached the level of transformation.

this day.

The Dragon Ancient Demon came to inform Ye Tian that he had taken on a group task that needed to be completed by these emperors.

For the first time, Ye Tian and the others came to the emperors.

Seeing that thirty emperor-level people were coming, the Dragon Ancient Demon said: "I took a group mission, and found a vein of Huoxi stone in the battlefield of Huoxi time and space, you go to dig the vein, if this task is not difficult, the reward is not much, but it is safer." As long as you are careful, you can dig enough fire stones and return immediately, and it should be fine. "

"Yes!"

Many emperors responded one after another.

After all, 1,000 Ancient Demon Epochs must complete a group mission, and they can't do it if they don't complete it.

In order to ensure the completion of the first mission, the Dragon Ancient Demon was ready to protect them secretly, in case he encountered that extremely terrifying emperor-level, even if he was suppressed in strength, at least he would be able to protect them!

Swish!!!

A group of Emperor-level and Dragon Ancient Demons left the Arrowmu Fortress one after another, heading to the Fire Stone Vein.

......

"Here we are, here it is!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And at this moment, it is not only their wargroup that is digging ore veins, but there are also many emperor-level warbands of other warbands who are digging fire stones.

"Let's get started!"

Everyone began to dig the veins of the fire stone, and the veins here were very tough, but they were not easy for the emperors.

Time passed slowly, and pieces of fire stones were excavated.

And until they dug up enough fire stones, this place was not attacked.

And on the way back, a large net appeared in the void, covering the area.

Immediately after, a big hand grabbed it, and it was an extremely terrifying emperor-level existence, and there was more than one.

At the critical moment, Longgu appeared.

Rumble!!!!

The Dragon Ancient Demon blasted out with a punch, shattering the opponent's attack.

However, at this moment, another ancient demon-level existence appeared, and it was obvious that there was also an ancient demon-level existence on the other side.
